question: What is WhatsApp Marketing, and how does it help my business?
answer: WhatsApp Marketing involves using WhatsApp to reach your target audience directly. It allows for personalized communication, instant updates, and higher engagement rates compared to traditional email marketing, ultimately helping you drive more sales and build stronger customer relationships.

question: Is WhatsApp Marketing good for small businesses in India?
answer: Yes, absolutely! With millions of active users in India, WhatsApp is one of the most effective channels for small businesses to connect with local customers, offer support, and promote products directly where their audience spends the most time.

question: How does WhatsApp automation work?
answer: Automation allows you to set up predefined responses, welcome messages, and automated follow-ups. This means your business can provide 24/7 customer support and lead nurturing without requiring manual intervention for every single query.

question: Can Global Webify manage my WhatsApp campaigns?
answer: Yes, our team at Global Webify specializes in end-to-end WhatsApp marketing. We handle everything from strategy and campaign creation to automation setup and performance tracking, ensuring you get the highest ROI possible.
